_comment: Per-role model routing. Each role -> {provider, model}. Override any role at runtime with env MODEL_<ROLE> (and optional PROVIDER_<ROLE>), e.g. MODEL_JUDGE=openai/gpt-4o-mini. The investigator MUST be a tool-capable model. ':free' models are rate-limited (fine for single runs; the judge in the eval loop may need a paid model). Validate model ids at https://openrouter.ai/models.

_examples._note: Swap any role above with one of these (VALIDATE ids at openrouter.ai/models first; some may 404 or be rate-limited).
